description: Cost Envelope Per-Symbol Configuration - Optimized for Multi-Pair Trading

rationale.per_symbol_thresholds: USDJPY has naturally wider spreads (~20-40% higher than EUR/GBP) due to different market microstructure. Calibrated to achieve ~5% breach rate per symbol based on causal analysis.
rationale.usdjpy_threshold: Raised from 0.5 to 0.65 bps to reduce breach rate from 13.23% to target ~5% (based on p95 of observed spread distribution).
rationale.eurusd_gbpusd_threshold: Maintained at 0.5 bps (already within target: 1.25-1.30% breach rate).
rationale.expected_impact: ROI recovery from -0.98% (global 0.5) to ~+12% with per-symbol enforcement. Eliminates 96.6% of USDJPY-driven collateral freezes.
